---
name: feature-planning
description: Shape feature requests into implementation-ready scope with DoR/DoD and test intent.
user-invocable: true
---

# Skill: feature-planning

## Purpose

Standardize feature shaping before implementation.

## Inputs

- Feature prompt/issue.
- Existing roadmap and architecture constraints.

## Checks

1. Scope has explicit in/out boundaries.
2. Acceptance criteria are testable.
3. Initial failing tests are specified.
4. Rollout and fallback plans exist.

## Output

- Feature brief draft.
- DoR status.
- Proposed implementation slices.
